mapper.select:
SELECT id, ticket_code AS ticketCode, ticket_name AS ticketName, status, maintenance_plan_name AS maintenancePlanName, operation_team AS operationTeam, task_type AS taskType, production_impact AS productionImpact, entrust_type AS entrustType, maintenance_resource AS maintenanceResource, maintenance_content AS maintenanceContent, abnormal_phenomenon AS abnormalPhenomenon, handling_opinion AS handlingOpinion, plan_id AS planId, plan_code AS planCode, maintenance_category AS maintenanceCategory, maintenance_start_time AS maintenanceStartTime, maintenance_end_time AS maintenanceEndTime, standard_id AS standardId, standard_code AS standardCode, part_code AS partCode, part_name AS partName, item_name AS itemName, profession, risk_factor AS riskFactor, safety_measure AS safetyMeasure, work_category AS workCategory, acceptance_level AS acceptanceLevel, creator_id AS creatorId, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM maintenance_ticket
AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
AND ticket_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ticketCode}, '%')
AND ticket_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ticketName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND part_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{partCode}, '%')
AND part_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{partName}, '%')
AND standard_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{standardCode}, '%')
AND plan_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{planCode}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, ticket_code AS ticketCode, ticket_name AS ticketName, status, maintenance_plan_name AS maintenancePlanName, operation_team AS operationTeam, task_type AS taskType, production_impact AS productionImpact, entrust_type AS entrustType, maintenance_resource AS maintenanceResource, maintenance_content AS maintenanceContent, abnormal_phenomenon AS abnormalPhenomenon, handling_opinion AS handlingOpinion, plan_id AS planId, plan_code AS planCode, maintenance_category AS maintenanceCategory, maintenance_start_time AS maintenanceStartTime, maintenance_end_time AS maintenanceEndTime, standard_id AS standardId, standard_code AS standardCode, part_code AS partCode, part_name AS partName, item_name AS itemName, profession, risk_factor AS riskFactor, safety_measure AS safetyMeasure, work_category AS workCategory, acceptance_level AS acceptanceLevel, creator_id AS creatorId, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM maintenance_ticket WHERE id = #{id}
AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maintenance_ticket ( ticket_code, ticket_name, status, maintenance_plan_name, operation_team, task_type, production_impact, entrust_type, maintenance_resource, maintenance_content, abnormal_phenomenon, handling_opinion, plan_id, plan_code, maintenance_category, maintenance_start_time, maintenance_end_time, standard_id, standard_code, part_code, part_name, item_name, profession, risk_factor, safety_measure, work_category, acceptance_level, creator_id, creator_username, creator_name, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{ticketCode}, #{ticketName}, #{status}, #{maintenancePlanName}, #{operationTeam}, #{taskType}, #{productionImpact}, #{entrustType}, #{maintenanceResource}, #{maintenanceContent}, #{abnormalPhenomenon}, #{handlingOpinion}, #{planId}, #{planCode}, #{maintenanceCategory}, #{maintenanceStartTime}, #{maintenanceEndTime}, #{standardId}, #{standardCode}, #{partCode}, #{partName}, #{itemName}, #{profession}, #{riskFactor}, #{safetyMeasure}, #{workCategory}, #{acceptanceLevel}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorUsername}, #{creatorName}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
